title: gymnadenia × delphineae
intro: Gymnadenia × delphineae is a hybrid orchid plant that is a cross between Gymnadenia conopsea and Gymnadenia densiflora, commonly known as the winter gentian or winter gentian orchid. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gymnadenia × delphineae include its ability to improve respiratory issues, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Gymnadenia × delphineae can be used as a tea or tincture, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
